entity.label: Eltekeh
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: God is its fear, a city in the tribe of Dan. It was a city of refuge and a Levitical city (Josh. 21:23). It has been identified with Beit-Likia, north-east of latrum.

nodes.label: Eltekeh
nodes.description: God is its fear, a city in the tribe of Dan. It was a city of refuge and a Levitical city (Josh. 21:23). It has been identified with Beit-Likia, north-east of latrum.

verses.text: And Eltekeh, and Gibbethon, and Baalath,
